Construction of Pilot Medians for Landscape Master Plan

Title:  

Construction of Pilot Medians for Landscape Master Plan

Agency:  

City of Palm Desert

State:  

California

NAICS Code:  

561730

Industry:  

Construction

Solicitation Type:  

Invitation for Bid

Solicitation ID:

Open Date:  

5/18/2026

Pre-Bid Meeting Date:  

5/26/2026(Mandatory)

Questions Due Date:  

6/1/2026

Close Date:  

6/11/2026

Project Duration:  

90 days

Last Updated:  

6/4/2026

Description:
The City of Palm Desert is seeking a qualified contractor to construct landscape improvements at three locations as a pilot project for the Median Landscape Master Plan. The project involves furnishing all labor, materials, equipment, tools, transportation, supervision, traffic control, utility coordination, and incidental work necessary to complete the project. Major components include mobilization, clearing and grubbing, dust control, landscape grading, soil preparation, irrigation and electrical connections, plant installation, boulder and decomposed granite installation, stone paving, maintenance, plant establishment, and warranty-related replacement work. The contractor shall carefully review the plans, field conditions, scope of work, and contract requirements before submitting a bid. Some key features of the project include: • Construction of pilot medians in three locations to demonstrate the landscape design for the Median Landscape Master Plan • Implementation of median improvements consistent with the approved project plans and the City's landscape standards • Furnishing all labor, materials, equipment, tools, transportation, supervision, traffic control, utility coordination, and incidental work necessary to complete the project • Coordination of work, protection of existing improvements, maintenance of public convenience and safety, obtaining required approvals before proceeding with work activities, and completion of the project in accordance with the Contract Documents
Attached Files:

Please visit the bid source via the “Link to Bid Source” button below for documentation.

Contact Information:

Maria Murillo(Management Analyst; Senior Management Analyst)

mmurillo@palmdesert.gov

(760) 574-7781

Budget Estimate (AI):

$550,000 – $650,000

Based on the engineer's estimate, the budget for this project is expected to be around $600,000. This estimate is likely based on the scope of work, materials, and labor required to complete the project. The actual budget may vary depending on the bids received and the final contract award. Factors that may influence the likely payment range include: - The complexity of the landscape design and construction - The types and quantities of materials required - The labor costs and availability of skilled workers - The project timeline and any potential delays or changes to the scope of work
